title: Aulacospermum popovii
taxonomy: Aulacospermum popovii is classified within the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This family is a part of the order Apiales, which is a group of flowering plants. Further, the order Apiales is a part of the clade Magnoliophyta, which includes all flowering plants.
